hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // ""' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -q 'docs/features/' && printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PostToolUse","additionalContext":"REMINDER: You just wrote/edited a file under docs/features/. Open docs/INDEX.md and update the feature row: add a new row if this feature is missing, or update its status emoji if it changed. Never skip this step."}}' || true; }
